flags.concern: video-editor-effect-registry: Step 2's code-only dedup would freeze or race parameter schema updates when code stays the same.
flags.evidence: Revised Step 2 to use structural schema comparison (`JSON.stringify`) instead of dropping schema from dedup — addresses FLAG-001's evidence that schema can change independently of code via EffectCreatorPanel. Added `schemasEqual` helper and test coverage for structural dedup. Acknowledged FLAG-002's render-purity concern in Step 3 — the guard is the right pragmatic fix since registry is stable and children need synchronous visibility on first mount; no scope creep into useEffect refactoring.

flags.concern: video-editor-effect-registry: Recurring debt: Step 3's identity guard still mutates the module registry during React render, so it does not actually contain the render-purity bug it is targeting.
